name: Old Fashioned Chocolate Icing
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Karo syrup or other syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well, and cook with candy thermometer to 232 degrees.
2. Add in:
- 1/2 stick margarine or butter
- 1 tsp vanilla
3. Do not stir! Let it cool to 130 degrees, then beat well.
This is the recipe used by the lady who made all the birthday cakes and special occasion cakes in our community for years. It's worth the effort.
